svg.title: BookMyShow HLD with Fallback Mechanisms
svg.desc: Complete BookMyShow high-level design with fallback and crash recovery for all services, Redis, PostgreSQL, Kafka, and payment failures.

g.text: Find movies by city + date + genre

svg.text: — fallback zone 1: search / cache / gateway failure —

g.text: Crash scenario A — search service or Redis down

svg.text: — fallback zone 2: seat map / WebSocket failure —

g.text: Crash scenario B — Redis seat state or WS down
Acquire distributed lock per seat in Redis
Push ticket + QR code to user

svg.text: — fallback zone 3: booking service / Redis lock failure —

g.text: Crash scenario C — booking service or Redis lock crash
Crash scenario D — payment gateway or service failure
Crash scenario E — primary PostgreSQL crash
Crash scenario F — Kafka broker or notification down
Source of truth for all data
